title: Bethesda announces remasters of Fallout 3 and New Vegas, Fallout 5 in pre-production and new content for Starfield
summary: The company presents its roadmap with multiple projects in development, while Todd Howard assures that The Elder Scrolls 6 remains the priority.

title: Doom directors deny that id Software has been weakened by Xbox cuts
summary: Hugo Martin and other executives affirm that the studio continues to operate normally and that what matters is the quality of the games.

title: Marathon director Joe Ziegler leaves Bungie just four months before launch
summary: His departure adds to a series of changes at the studio in a turbulent time.

title: Castlevania: Belmont's Curse receives excellent reviews in its first previews
summary: The media highlight its frenetic gameplay and cinematography inspired by the Netflix series.

title: Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders generate $260 million in first week
summary: Despite conflicting reports, the pre-order campaign is the strongest ever recorded, according to Newzoo.

title: Studio ZA/UM lays off employees two months after launching Zero Parades
summary: The Disco Elysium studio states that the game's commercial performance does not allow maintaining the current size.

title: God of War live-action series changes actor for Kratos after set injury
summary: Ryan Hurst leaves the role due to an accident, and Prime Video looks for a replacement.

title: GameStop CEO declares that physical games are irrelevant to the business
summary: Ryan Cohen states that the physical format represents less than 12% of the company's sales.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 clarifies that its assistant Gunny is not a chatbot and that the flash was a bug
summary: The developers respond to criticism and confirm that the game is not afraid to compete with GTA 6.

title: Battlefield 6 brings back Carrier Assault mode in a collaboration with Top Gun
summary: Season 4 will include a crossover with the film franchise, bringing content beyond cosmetics.

title: A24 faces criticism for claiming copyright on Backrooms content it does not own
summary: Kane Parsons defends an artist affected by the studio's legal actions.

title: Saudi Arabia's acquisition of EA clears EU regulatory hurdle
summary: A The Sims artist says they would fight any mandate to reduce diversity after the purchase.

title: Deborah Ann Woll is not worried about criticism of her character Laufey in God of War
summary: The actress assures that online insults do not affect her and that she is proud of her work.

title: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey sparks controversy over its flashing scenes that can trigger epilepsy
summary: Polygon explains the ending and Kotaku warns of aggressive imagery that could trigger seizures.

title: The end of physical format on PlayStation would affect 62% of countries, according to analysis
summary: Angry fans flood the Wolverine trailer in protest.

title: Marvel moves to Los Angeles after 87 years in New York and fires its most controversial editor
summary: The change ends a nearly century-old tradition in the comic book industry.

title: Unions accuse Microsoft of illegal layoffs at Xbox as tensions rise
summary: A wave of rumors and changes shakes the company's video game division.

title: Blizzard reverses almost all unpopular changes from Diablo 4 Season 14
summary: The company admits that not all ideas work as expected and restores content.

title: Todd Howard insists he holds no grudge against Obsidian or Fallout: New Vegas
summary: The Bethesda executive also speaks on the exclusivity of The Elder Scrolls 6 and Fallout 5.

title: The Star Wars: KOTOR remake is still in development and targets a 2028 release
summary: Saber Interactive confirms the project is alive and progressing as planned.
